metadata.title: Smart Composer
metadata.description: AI chat with note context, smart writing assistance, and one-click edits for your vault.

text:"How to obtain API keys"
text:"No files match the exclusion patterns"
regex.target: text:"没有文件匹配排除模式"

regex.source: text:"No inclusion patterns specified - all files will be included (except those matching exclusion patterns)"
regex.target: text:"未指定包含模式 - 所有文件都将被包含（除了匹配排除模式的文件）"

regex.source: text:"No files match the inclusion patterns"
regex.target: text:"没有文件匹配包含模式"

regex.source: .setDesc("Enter your API keys for the services you want to use")
regex.target: .setDesc("输入您要使用的服务的API密钥")

regex.source: .setDesc("Choose the model you want to use for chat")
.setDesc("Choose the model you want to use for apply")
.setDesc("Choose the model you want to use for embeddings")
.setDesc("This prompt will be added to the beginning of every chat.")
regex.target: .setDesc("此提示将添加到每次聊天的开头。")

regex.source: .setDesc("The API endpoint for your Ollama service (e.g., http://127.0.0.1:11434)")
.setDesc("Select a model from your Ollama instance")
regex.target: .setDesc("从您的Ollama实例中选择一个模型")

regex.source: .setDesc("The API endpoint for your OpenAI-compatible service (e.g., https://api.example.com/v1)")
.setDesc("Your authentication key for the OpenAI-compatible service")
.setDesc("The specific model to use with your service (e.g., llama-3.1-70b, mixtral-8x7b)")
regex.target: .setDesc("与您的服务一起使用的特定模型（例如：llama-3.1-70b, mixtral-8x7b）")

regex.source: .setDesc('Files matching ANY of these patterns will be excluded from indexing. One pattern per line. Uses glob patterns (e.g., "private/*", "*.tmp"). Leave empty to exclude nothing. After changing this, use the command "Rebuild entire vault index" to apply changes.')
regex.target: .setDesc('匹配这些模式中任意一个的文件将被排除在索引之外。每行一个模式。使用glob模式（例如："private/*", "*.tmp"）。留空则不排除任何文件。更改后，请使用"重建整个知识库索引"命令来应用更改。')

regex.source: .setDesc('Set the chunk size for text splitting. After changing this, please re-index the vault using the "Rebuild entire vault index" command.')
regex.target: .setDesc('设置文本分块的大小。更改后，请使用"重建整个知识库索引"命令重新索引知识库。')

regex.source: .setDesc("Maximum number of tokens before switching to RAG. If the total tokens from mentioned files exceed this, RAG will be used instead of including all file contents.")
regex.target: .setDesc("切换到RAG之前的最大token数。如果提及文件的总token数超过此值，将使用RAG而不是包含所有文件内容。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Minimum similarity score for RAG results. Higher values return more relevant but potentially fewer results.")
regex.target: .setDesc("RAG结果的最小相似度分数。值越高返回的结果越相关，但可能数量越少。")

regex.source: .setDesc("Maximum number of RAG results to include in the prompt. Higher values provide more context but increase token usage.")
regex.target: .setDesc("要包含在提示中的RAG结果的最大数量。值越高提供的上下文越多，但会增加token使用量。")

regex.source: .setPlaceholder("Enter your API key")
